titleStmt.title: SII 24.67: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 67. (A.R. No. 121 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of tax-free land to Uttamachōḻanallūr-uḍaiyāṉ alias Nārāyaṇaṉ Malaikkiṉiya-niṉṟāṉ alias Mummuḍichōḻa Viḻupparaiyaṉ and Padmanābhaṉ Vishṇumūrti, the servant (paṉimagaṉ) of the former under the orders from Chōḻaśikhāmaṇi Mūvēndavēḷār, the Śrīkāryam of the temple stipulating the payment of a specified quantity of paddy to the temple.
Dated in the year opposite the 21st i.e. the 22nd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil pon nemi yaḷavun tanṉemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir muṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭāttik kittiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit ten ticai temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potu maiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannila pāvai taṉ tanimaiyum tavirap punitaṟ tirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi (tannaṭi) yiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonṉila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇum tanatu tiruniḻal veṇkuṭai veṇ
karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponṉakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkula piṟai pol niṟpiḻai yennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉkai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇavūr naṭuve nat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tanmānamum kūṟina vīramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷu lkaḷun talaivirittala marak (k) kuṭaticait tanṉāḷukantu tānun tāṉaiyum panṉāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payantetirmāṟina jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāvāviṭai maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkariniraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇavennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum O
raivarum porutamaṟkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟik koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticaitoṟu nirutti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭ potiyilum matta veṅkaṟi paṭumaiyyac caiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cā lān tani vi māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukkalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tannal koḷāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum viramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārtoḻac civaniṭattumai yena(t) tina cintāmaṇip puvanamuḻutuṭai yāḷiruppa Avan muṭikkaṅkai viṟṟiruntatena
ya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 mitan Etir Āṇṭaikku Āḻvaār tiruvaraṅka tevar koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa coḻa cikāmaṇi muventa veḷār Ēvalpaṭi Āḻvār kanmikaḷom ḷum Uttama coḻanA blank space of about 3 ft. is left here.mummuṭi coḻa viḻuppa� paṇimakan kiḻān paṟmanāpan viṣṇumurttikkum malaikkiniya niṉṟān tirunaṉtavānattukkut tirunantavānappuṟamākavum taṇṭuṟaippā laṭuttukkuṭutta nila maraiyum viṣṇumūrttikkut tirunantavānap puṟamāka meṟpaṭi yūrillaṭuttuk kuṭu
A blank space of about 4 ft. is left here. tta nilam Araiyum Āka nilam velikkum Ivarkaḷ pakkal śrīpaṇṭārattu ta nilattukkicainta perunānkellai Āḻvār koḻuntu viḷākattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai maturāntaka viḷākattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai śrīnāraciṅka vayakkalukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tarumavakai vayakkalukkut teṟkum yicain=ta perunāṉ kellai Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Āṟuṭaittu nūṟu samvatsa ratti Uṟdecam pāḻaṭain=ta nilam veliyum mummuṭicoḻa viḻup paraiyanukkum paṟmanāpan viṣṇumurttikkum tan
ttuk kuṭuttu Ivarkaḷ Innilam tiruttaṟat tirutti Āḻvār [śrīpaṇṭā] ḷi koṇṭān marakkālāl Eṇ kala nellaḷakkak kaṭavatākavum Itil mikuti koṇṭu tirutti Irai paṭi cantirātittavaṟ ṇi kuṟaivā kāmaṟ ceyyakkaṭavarān dāsarkaḷ tiruvaraṅkatevan veṇṇaik kūtta dāsanukku nāḷ 1- nṟukku nel kuṟuṇiyum puṭavaimutalāṇṭu varai kāconṟum Ārāvamutu dāsanukku nāḷ 1- nṟukku nel kuṟuṇiyum Āṇṭu varai puṭavaimutal kāconṟum malaikiniyaninṟān dāsanukku nāḷ 1- nṟukku nel kuṟuṇiyum puṭavai mutal kāconṟum tiruvaraṅkamāḷidā
ḷ 1- nṟukku nel kuṟuṇiyum puṭavai mutal kāconṟum Ākap pon [ḍa 2 �] kku nāḷ 1- nṟukku nel tūṇiyum Āṇṭuvarai puṭavai mutal kāconṟum koṇṭu Ittirunantavānam miraṇṭum cantirātittavar kkaṭavarākavum Ituvallatu tiruvācaṟ ponta kuṭimai Eppeṟpaṭṭatum ceyyak kaṭavārallātārākavum Ipparicicaintu Uttama coḻa nallūruṭaiyānāna nārāyaṇan malaikiniyaninṟānāna mummuṭicoḻa viḻupparaiyaṟkup paṇi makan nallaṅ kiḻān pan viṣṇumūrttikkum tiru nantavanappuṟamāka Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷomum mutaṟ karaṇattārkaḷomum
śrī vayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiru vamu ruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku yān cirākavan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirāmanen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkup pāratāyan kecuvan Aṟivariyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven śrī vayiṣṇavan nā n tirunāṭuṭaiyānen Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven perumpuliyūr tiruvākkula muṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven kāñcikkuṟi vaṭakopuramuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Itu śrīvaiyiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
